About Us
SVS Automation, established in 2017, started by professionals having 25+ years of experience & skill in the field of Robotics, Engineering, Industrial Automation, Design, Manufacturing and Product Development.
OUR VISION
SVS Automation tends to provide innovative and cost-effective solutions to our customers.We could build and customize the automation system to suit your production requirements, that could optimize your people, processes and equipment into your manufacturing plant.
Hence, this factory automation system could improve your daily production line in terms of quality control, productivity, optimizing efficiency, low labour dependence, production on-line monitoring, etc.
SVS Automation specializes in innovative designing and implementing the automation systems such as-robot automation solution, various type of conveyor system, material handling, laser cell, mechanical & electrical engineering, control system, etc., that fit your specific manufacturing needs. With our own in-house manufacturing facilities, we are providing a high-quality product but with low-cost solution, in order to meet your expectation.
Why Choose Us
Genuine Individuals. Meaningful Efforts. Tangible Benefits.
Digital Transformation partner for Today & Tomorrow
Commitment to quality and innovation
Commitment to quality and innovation
Comprehensive solutions for your business needs
Comprehensive solutions for your business needs
A partner for today and tomorrow.

Join hands with SVS Automation to take your business to new heights. Let’s explore opportunities, expand horizons, and achieve success together.
